# Tooltip

Provides supplemental context when a control is hovered or focused.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/tooltip
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="tooltip"
  example={0}
  code={`<Tooltip.Provider><Tooltip.Root><Tooltip.Trigger>Help</Tooltip.Trigger><Tooltip.Content>Helpful context</Tooltip.Content></Tooltip.Root></Tooltip.Provider>`}
/>

```tsx
<Tooltip.Provider>
  <Tooltip.Root>
    <Tooltip.Trigger>Help</Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content>Helpful context</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Root>
</Tooltip.Provider>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="tooltip"
  example={1}
  code={`<Tooltip.Root defaultOpen><Tooltip.Trigger>Open</Tooltip.Trigger><Tooltip.Content>Visible by default</Tooltip.Content></Tooltip.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Tooltip.Root defaultOpen>
  <Tooltip.Trigger>Open</Tooltip.Trigger>
  <Tooltip.Content>Visible by default</Tooltip.Content>
</Tooltip.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="tooltip"
  example={2}
  code={`<Tooltip.Content side="bottom">Positioned below the trigger</Tooltip.Content>`}
/>

```tsx
<Tooltip.Content side="bottom">Positioned below the trigger</Tooltip.Content>
```
